title: Media management systems
summary: Organisation and management of media within a creative production workflow.

lensAssignments.rationale: The responsibility centres on creating, managing, transforming or delivering media to an audience.
This is a distinct supporting responsibility: The responsibility centres on defining the system model, boundaries, structure, workflows or intended operation.
lensAssignments.lensSummary: System and product-definition responsibility: Organisation and management of media within a creative production workflow.
